description: S37: Artifact Viewer - Create ArtifactViewer widget that detects code/HTML/markdown artifacts in AI responses and shows them in a full-screen modal with syntax highlighting, HTML preview toggle, and copy/download actions. Integrate with chat_bubble.dart.
steps: Create frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/chat/artifact_viewer.dart with: (a) ArtifactType enum (code, html, markdown, chart, unknown), (b) Static method detectArtifactType(String content) that parses message content - if contains ```html -> html, if contains ```dart/python/js/ts etc -> code, if long structured text with # headers -> markdown, default unknown, (c) ArtifactViewer StatefulWidget with props: content (String), artifactType (ArtifactType)

Build the artifact modal (full screen) in artifact_viewer.dart: (a) Background bgPrimary, (b) Top bar with title showing detected type, close X button on right, copy button that copies artifact content, (c) For HTML type: toggle tabs 'Preview' | 'Code', (d) Code artifact view: dark background #0D0D0D, JetBrains Mono 13px, horizontally scrollable, line numbers on left, copy button top right, (e) HTML artifact view: placeholder for WebView (use webview_flutter), toggle to source code, (f) Markdown artifact view: rendered with flutter_markdown, clean document style, (g) Bottom bar with placeholder Run button (for code), download button, share button

Add a 'View Artifact' button below AI messages: (a) Small row with Icons.open_in_new 14px + 'View' or 'Preview' text in DM Sans 12px, persian color, (b) Only shows when artifactType != unknown, (c) On tap: show the artifact modal as a full-screen route or dialog

Update frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/chat/chat_bubble.dart: (a) Import artifact_viewer.dart, (b) After rendering AI message content (in _buildAiBubble), check ArtifactViewer.detectArtifactType(message.content), (c) If artifactType != ArtifactType.unknown, show the 'View Artifact' button below the content, (d) Extract the artifact content (code block content or full content) to pass to ArtifactViewer
acceptance_criteria: artifact_viewer.dart exists with ArtifactType enum and detectArtifactType static method
Detection correctly identifies HTML, code, and markdown artifact types
Full-screen modal has top bar with title, close, copy; content area with type-specific rendering; bottom bar with actions
Code view uses dark background, monospace font, line numbers
chat_bubble.dart shows 'View Artifact' button below AI messages that contain artifacts
No dynamic types, strict null safety, proper error handling
verification: Review artifact_viewer.dart for correct structure, enum, detection logic
Review chat_bubble.dart changes for proper integration
Verify no dynamic types or null safety issues
